International Women's Day — Move & Manifest

This Sunday we're bringing women together to move, reset and take a moment to think about what we want from the year ahead. We'll begin with an empowering yoga flow followed by guided journalling and reflection.

A space to move, reconnect with yourself and spend time with a supportive community of women.

You don't need to be 'good' at yoga or journalling. Just come as you are.

Sunday - Limited spaces
Book via the link in bio.
£5
Bring a friend who might need this

#internationalwomensday #womensupportingwomen #manchesterevents #wellnesscommunity #yogamanchester #journalling #mindfulmoment #communityevents #thewellnesshubmcr

Salford 100 Year | Day 26 | 1950

被判死刑的街道 — 一個「X」字改變的命運
Streets Marked for Death — The X That Changed Everything

1950年，清拆工人走遍 Salford 的維多利亞式排屋，在磚牆和門框上用粉筆或油漆寫下「X」，再加上「CONDEMNED」一字。這不是塗鴉，是官方宣判——這條街道的生命倒數開始了。

In 1950, clearance workers walked through Salford's Victorian terraces, chalking or painting an 'X' alongside the word 'CONDEMNED' on brick walls and door frames. This was no graffiti — it was an official death sentence for entire streets.

Source: University of Salford, Modern Salford Archive.
一個「X」字，是終結，也是新生的開始。
One 'X' was an ending. It was also a beginning.

#Salford100 #Salford #History #CondemnedStreets #SalfordHongKongers

Join Our Next Clean Up Salford Quays — Great British Spring Clean

We're back for our next Clean Up Salford Quays, and this time it's part of the Great British Spring Clean — the UK's biggest mass action to tackle litter and care for our communities.

As the days get longer and spring begins, it's the perfect opportunity to get outside, meet great people, and help keep the Quays looking its best.

Sunday 15th March 2026
11:00am
Meet at: Sainsbury's (Harbour City tram stop) — M50 2HG
All equipment is provided — just bring yourself, comfortable shoes, and a bit of community spirit.

Please spread the word to friends, family, and neighbours and come along if you can.

#cleanupsalfordquays #greatbritishspringclean

Salford 100 Year | Day 25 | 1949

貧民窟終須清拆 — Salford 戰後重建序章
The Slums Must Go — Salford's Post-War Renewal Begins

1949年6月，Salford 衛生醫務官 John Lancelot Burn 正式啟動戰後首個貧民窟清拆計劃。磚一塊一塊地拆，他們拆走了恥辱。街一條一條地清，他們還給了 Salford 尊嚴。

In June 1949, Salford's Medical Officer of Health John Lancelot Burn launched the city's first post-war slum clearance programme. Brick by brick, they tore down the shame. Street by street, they gave Salford back its dignity.

#Salford100 #SalfordHistory #SlumClearance #SalfordHongKongers

Salford 100 Year | Day 24 | 1948

戰火過後，公園重生 — Buile Hill Park 重開
After the Flames, the Park Lives Again — Buile Hill Park Reopens

戰爭期間，Buile Hill Park 被徵用作軍事用途，草坪遭挖掘，樹木被砍伐。1948年，公園終於重新對外開放，成為 Salford 戰後復甦的象徵。穿越烽火與戰爭，樹木挺立——Salford 人亦然。

During the war, Buile Hill Park was requisitioned for military use — its lawns dug up, its trees felled. In 1948, the park finally reopened to the public, becoming a symbol of Salford's post-war recovery. Through fire and war, the trees endured — and so did Salford.

#Salford100 #SalfordHistory #BuileHillPark #SalfordHongKongers #PostWar

Salford 100 | Day 22 | 1946

洪水之城——伊維爾河的憤怒
City Under Water — The Fury of the River Irwell

戰爭剛結束，Salford 人以為最壞的日子已經過去。但 1946 年 9 月，伊維爾河（River Irwell）在短短 12 小時內降下超過兩吋暴雨，決堤氾濫，70 年來最嚴重的洪水席捲全城。超過 5,300 個家庭被洪水淹浸，Lower Broughton 一帶街道積水三呎。

The war had barely ended when Salford was struck again. In September 1946, over two inches of rain fell in just 12 hours, causing the River Irwell to burst its banks — the worst flooding in 70 years. Over 5,300 families were affected.

洪水無情，人情更暖。
When the flood came, the community held firm.

#Salford100 #Salford #HongKongers #History #1946Floods

Salford 100 Year | Day 21 | 1945

VE Day — 勝利日
Victory Day — The War is Over

1945年德國正式投降，歐洲戰場劃上句號。Salford 的街道，那一天變成了歡樂的海洋——家家戶戶掛起 Union Jack，長桌擺上街心，鄰里共飲，孩子歡呼，老人抹淚。

On 8 May 1945, Germany's unconditional surrender brought the European war to an end. Six years of war had damaged or destroyed over 4,000 homes in Salford alone.

Victory was not the end. It was the beginning of rebuilding.

#Salford100 #Salford #History #PrefabHomes #CommunitySpirit

Salford 100 | Day 20 | 1944

從天而降的悲劇
When War Fell From the Sky

1944年7月30日，下午三時許。Pendlebury 的街道上，孩子們在玩耍。英國皇家空軍第106中隊的 Lancaster 轟炸機 PB304，剛完成諾曼底上空的任務，引擎突然失靈。七名機組人員無一生還。兩名平民遇難，近八十人受傷。

On 30 July 1944, RAF 106 Squadron Lancaster PB304 crashed into Regatta Street, Pendlebury — killing all seven crew members and two civilians, injuring nearly eighty.

#Salford100 #Salford #History #nowar #WW2History

新年快樂！打完麻雀迎新年

#salford #hongkongers

Salford 100 | Day 19 | 1943

Buile Hill Park 的鐵欄去咗邊？
Where Did Buile Hill Park's Railings Go?

1943年，Buile Hill Park 沿 Eccles Old Road 的維多利亞時代鑄鐵欄杆，根據國防法規被政府強制徵用，全部拆除熔煉。一對造價35英鎊的精鑄大閘，只換來 3先令9便士。

The stone bases along Eccles Old Road still stand today. The railings never came back.

#Salford100 #SalfordHistory #BuileHillPark #WartimeBritain #HomeFront

Salford 100 Year | Day 18 | 1942

1942年，戰爭仍未終結，Salford 的街道在黑暗中靜默守候。ARP 義務民防員身穿藍色工裝、頭戴鋼盔，在漆黑夜裡逐家巡邏，提醒居民熄燈遮光。

In 1942, Salford's ARP wardens patrolled blacked-out streets through the night — steel helmets on, gas masks at the ready. These ordinary men and women formed the city's quiet shield against the darkness of war.

#Salford #History #Salford100 #Hongkongers #WWII

Salford 100 Year | Day 17 | 1941

德軍空襲席捲英格蘭北部，Salford在隆隆炸彈聲中燃起熊熊火光。街坊鄰里在防空警報響起時互相扶持，ARP民防義工冒著砲火守護每一條街道。

In 1941, the German Blitz brought fire and destruction to the streets of Salford. ARP wardens and ordinary residents stood together, sheltering neighbours and guiding families to safety amid the rubble and flames.

#Salford #History #Salford100 #Hongkongers #TheBlitz

Salford 100 Years - Day 16: 1941

Wartime Factory Production

1941年，索爾福德的工廠進入24小時生產模式。數千名女性進入軍工廠，操作重型機械，生產炮彈、飛機零件和軍事裝備。

In 1941, Salford's factories entered 24-hour production mode. Thousands of women entered munitions factories, operating heavy machinery to produce shells, aircraft parts, and military equipment. Their contribution was vital to Allied victory.

#Salford #Salford100 #Salfordhistory #hongkongers #WomenInWar

Salford 100 Years - Day 15: 1940

The Manchester Blitz

1940年12月22-24日，德國空軍對曼徹斯特和索爾福德發動猛烈轟炸。超過200人喪生，數千人無家可歸。然而，索爾福德人展現出驚人的韌性。

On December 22-24, 1940, the German Luftwaffe launched fierce bombardment on Manchester and Salford. Over 200 people died, thousands were left homeless. Though the bombing destroyed buildings, it couldn't destroy Salford's spirit.

#Salford #Salford100 #Salfordhistory #hongkongers #ManchesterBlitz
@homeplacekitchen

Thank you for riding into the new year with us! This is how we celebrated the Year of the Horse with @salfordhongkongerscic @lorisleeliondance and @globalkids.world

Lanterns, calligraphy, red packets giveaway, Mahjong tournament, pop-ups, and a lion dance that shook the room. Today was a full-on celebration of culture, community, and new beginnings. What was your favourite part of the day? Let us know in the comments.

#yearofthehorse #kargomkt #manchester #community #salfordquays

Salford 100 Years - Day 14: 1939

Preparing for War

1939年9月，當英國向德國宣戰時，索爾福德迅速進入戰時狀態。Anderson 防空洞被安裝在後院；ARP志願者進行演習；家庭領取防毒面具。

In September 1939, when Britain declared war on Germany, Salford quickly entered wartime mode. Anderson air raid shelters, ARP drills, gas masks, blackout curtains — the city prepared for what was to come.

#Salford #Salford100 #Salfordhistory #hongkongers #WWII
